name: Superancient Deepsea King Coelacanth
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>古</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>シーラカンス
desc: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon as many Level 4 or lower Fish monsters as possible from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack and their effects are negated. When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Fish monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon as many Level 4 or lower Fish monsters as possible from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack and their effects are negated. When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Fish monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card.
eff: Once per turn: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon as many Level 4 or lower Fish monsters as possible from your Deck, but they cannot declare an attack and their effects are negated. When a card or effect is activated that targets this card on the field (Quick Effect): You can Tribute 1 other Fish monster; negate that effect, and if you do, destroy that card.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
Negates the activation of Spell Cards
Negates the activation of Trap Cards
Negates the activation of Effect Monster's effect
